name: Anessa Perfect UV Multi-Type Set
pros: Eight formulation options (milk, gel, brightening variant) let you choose perfect texture for your skin
Same legendary Shiseido quality as standalone products with convenient variety sampling
High review rating (4.79★) from smaller but engaged customer base confirms consistency
cons: Buying a set limits flexibility—you're committed to multiple bottles even if you dislike one variant
Similar pricing to single bottles (¥2,200), so value advantage over buying individually is minimal
shortDescription: Curated Anessa UV set offering texture variety within Japan's most trusted sunscreen line.
review: This set intelligently addresses the main complaint about Anessa: finding *your* perfect formula. Whether you prefer lightweight gel or nourishing milk, you get to try Shiseido's technology across formulations. The trade-off is commitment—you're buying multiple bottles rather than testing one first. Best for users already confident in the brand or those with partners to share variants with.
